readingNow.title: Reading now
readingNow.subtitle: Your current books will appear here.

debugLogs.title: Debug logs
debugLogs.subtitle: Console output is captured here (including release APK builds). Clear or export to a file to share with the developer.
debugLogs.empty: No entries yet. Open a book or wait for app messages.
debugLogs.exportNoCache: Cache directory is unavailable; cannot export.
debugLogs.exportSaved: File saved. Sharing is unavailable — path:

firstLaunch.message: Open a book in EPUB format from your device.

books.empty: No books yet. Tap “+” to choose an EPUB file.

errors.openFailed: Could not open or parse the book.
errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred while opening the book.
errors.timeoutCopy: Copying the EPUB into app storage took too long. Check the file and free space.
errors.timeoutUnzip: Unpacking the EPUB took too long. The file may be very large or corrupted.
errors.timeoutBookReady: Parsing the book structure (epubjs) did not finish in time. Try another file or export logs.
errors.timeoutPrepareChapter: Preparing the chapter took too long.

picker.invalidExtension: Please choose a file with the .epub extension.
picker.openFailed: Could not open the file picker. Please try again.

libraryScreen.title: Library
libraryScreen.subtitle: Open a book in EPUB format from your device.
